intentSynonyms: clone a dashboard with optional overrides in datadog
description: Clone an existing dashboard to create a copy. Optionally override the title or description. The original dashboard is not modified.

dashboard_id.description: ID of the dashboard to clone (e.g., "abc-def-ghi")

title.description: Title for the cloned dashboard. Defaults to "Clone of <original title>".

description.description: Override the description on the clone
